title: Analyze Healthcare Data: Boost Patient Outcomes
description:
Did you know that hospitals using data-driven performance metrics can reduce readmission rates by up to 25% while improving patient satisfaction scores?

This Short Course was created to help data analysis professionals accomplish foundational healthcare data interpretation and metrics recognition.

By completing this course, you'll be able to confidently identify and calculate key healthcare performance indicators, interpret exploratory data analysis reports, and extract actionable insights from healthcare visualizations that you can apply immediately in your healthcare data role.

By the end of this course, you will be able to:
- Recognize common healthcare performance metrics and their formulas
- Understand exploratory data analysis (EDA) reports to identify key patterns

This course is unique because it bridges the gap between general data analysis skills and healthcare-specific applications, providing you with industry-standard metrics used across hospitals and healthcare systems.

To be successful in this project, you should have a background in basic mathematics and introductory statistics concepts.
